name: Life On Earth, Inc.
summary: Life On Earth, Inc. operates as a cloud-based enterprise software developer and a provider. Its products are designed to help organizations innovate and modernize legacy systems while minimizing cost and risk of business disruptions and ensure regulatory compliance. The company focuses on technologies that include IOT, security, enterprise legacy software modernization, personal data and privacy compliance, enterprise software maintenance, and governance. The company was formerly known as Hispanica International Delights of America, Inc. and changed its name to Life On Earth, Inc. in February 2018. Life On Earth, Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in New York, New York.
